message:
🐛 Fix OAuth status flash: retry until backend is fully up (#1626)

The /health endpoint omits oauth_configured during startup, causing the
mount-time check to falsely set configured=false. Now retries every 2s
until backendUp=true, so the UI shows "Checking OAuth..." instead of
flashing "not configured" during startup.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
